title: pleurothallis iris
intro: Pleurothallis iris is a species of orchid, commonly known as the iris orchid, found in tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pleurothallis iris include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antioxidant effects. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant involve drying and infusing the roots or flowers in water to create teas or infusions for medicinal use.
